title: prpack config
description: Configuration file for prpack — pack a pull request into one markdown file for LLM code review.

base.description: Base ref to diff against. Defaults to origin/main, falls back to main.

out.description: Output file path. If omitted, writes to stdout.

includeTests.description: Include adjacent test files even if they didn't change.

includeUntracked.description: Include untracked files in the diff.

noContent.description: Skip full file contents — only include the diff. Useful for very large PRs.

maxBytes.description: Skip files larger than this many bytes.

preface.description: Reviewer note from the author. Inserted near the top of the output under "Reviewer note from author".

reviewPrompt.description: Review prompt appended to the end of the output, ready for the model to act on.
